label: Sequences, events & time series

node.label: Sequences, events & time series
node.definition: Ordered observations represent language, events, trajectories, biological sequences, and temporal processes.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Sequences, events & time series is modeled as depending on Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as Waveforms, audio & spectrograms, Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states.
examples: atlas downstream link to Waveforms, audio & spectrograms
atlas downstream link to Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings
atlas downstream link to Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.

dependencies.rationale: Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.
In this atlas graph, Sequences, events & time series has a `requires` dependency on Signal processing & harmonic analysis with `common` strength.
Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
